relationships.label: admires
relationships.description: Positive regard, sees as aspirational or worthy of emulation

relationships.label: identifies with
relationships.description: Strong resonance, sees self in the other

relationships.label: is fascinated by
relationships.description: Drawn to, intrigued by, finds compelling

relationships.label: fears becoming
relationships.description: Shadow connection, sees as negative potential self

relationships.label: contrasts with
relationships.description: Oppositional but informative, defines by difference

relationships.label: complements
relationships.description: Fills gaps, completes what the other lacks
